plan: 1. Scaffold a new Vite + React + TypeScript project using `npm create vite@latest` with the react-ts template, placing output directly in the repo root (currently empty aside from .gitignore, CLAUDE.md, Input/, Output/)
2. Review the generated scaffold and remove any boilerplate demo content (default App component content, logo assets, demo CSS) while keeping the structural files (main.tsx, App.tsx, vite-env.d.ts)
3. Update tsconfig.json to enable strict mode and ensure settings align with CLAUDE.md conventions (strict TypeScript, no any)
4. Update vite.config.ts to set base: '/' for static Vercel deployment
5. Update .gitignore to merge the existing entry (LOCK*) with Vite defaults (node_modules, dist, .env, etc.)
6. Replace default App.tsx with a minimal placeholder component (e.g. 'Card Deck v2' heading) so the default page loads meaningfully
7. Run `npm install` and verify it completes successfully
8. Run `npm run dev` and verify the dev server starts and the page loads
9. Run `npm run build` and verify it completes without TypeScript errors
10. Run `npm run preview` and verify it serves the built output
11. Verify all six acceptance criteria pass: install, dev, build, preview, page loads, no TS errors
testing_recommendations: Run `npm install` and confirm exit code 0 with no errors
Run `npm run build` and confirm exit code 0 and dist/ directory is created with index.html
Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to confirm zero TypeScript errors independently of the build
Run `npm run dev`, open the URL in a browser, and confirm the placeholder page renders
Run `npm run preview` after build and confirm the production bundle is served correctly
Verify .gitignore excludes node_modules and dist by running `git status` after install/build
risks: Vite scaffold may conflict with existing files (CLAUDE.md, .gitignore, Input/, Output/) — need to scaffold into a temp directory and merge, or use --template flag carefully
Node v25.8.0 is very recent — verify Vite and React dependencies are compatible with this version
The Input/ and Output/ folders are non-standard and must not be overwritten or moved by the scaffold process
